entity.summary: Automated-market-maker decentralized exchange protocol operating across Ethereum and Radix with token swaps, liquidity pools, and an impermanent-loss-focused Radix design.
entity.notes: HEI models DefiPlaza as one entity rather than splitting its Ethereum and Radix implementations. Official documentation describes DefiPlaza as AMM-based DEX infrastructure on both ecosystems.

evidence.title: Welcome to DefiPlaza
evidence.notes: Official documentation states that DefiPlaza facilitates token trades as an AMM and describes optimized DEX designs across Ethereum and Radix.

evidence.title: DefiPlaza Radix overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes the current Radix DEX and its token swap and liquidity functions.

evidence.title: DefiPlaza live liquidity application
evidence.notes: Live first-party application exposes pools, tokens, staking, portfolio, and current liquidity statistics, supporting active status.
